title: Clicking Into World Wide Web Day
story: Every August 1, people around the globe celebrate World Wide Web Day by appreciating the amazing invention that connects us all! story: Digging into the past became Brian Fagan's life work. Born in Birmingham, England on August 1, 1936, Fagan grew up to be a renowned archaeologist and writer. story: Co Hoedeman, a wizard of stop-motion animation, was born in Amsterdam in 1940. He became famous for bringing sand to life on screen. His film 'The Sand Castle' won hearts and awards. story: Yves Saint Laurent, a name that would reshape the fashion world, took his first breath in 1936.
